2605.25745.title: Selective Latent Thinking: Adaptive Compression of LLM Reasoning Chains
2605.25745.paper_summary: Explicit chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning substantially improves the reasoning ability of large language models (LLMs), but incurs high inference cost due to lengthy autoregressive traces. Existing latent reasoning methods offer a promising alternative, yet they often treat reasoning as uniformly compressible, causing precision-critical intermediate steps to be overly compressed and thereby degrading reasoning accuracy. In this work, we propose Selective Latent Thinking (SLT), a framework that selectively compresses redundant reasoning spans into latent representations while preserving precision-critical spans as explicit CoT within the same reasoning trajectory. Specifically, SLT first uses a lightweight decoder to anticipate a short upcoming reasoning span, and then applies confidence-based gating to determine the longest span that can be reliably compressed. The accepted span is encoded into a compact latent representation to improve reasoning efficiency, while uncertain or precision-critical reasoning remains in explicit CoT form to preserve accuracy. To learn this selective compression policy, SLT adopts a three-stage training strategy that combines span-level latent compression, reliability-aware future reasoning prediction, and trajectory-level reinforcement learning to optimize the trade-off between answer correctness and reasoning cost. Extensive experiments across four mathematical reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that SLT achieves 22.7\% higher accuracy than latent reasoning baselines at comparable compression ratios, while reducing reasoning chain length by 58.4\% with only 2.8\% accuracy degradation compared to explicit CoT,Our code can be found in https://github.com/hunshi34/SLT.
2605.25745.paper_summary_zh: 明確的思維鏈（CoT）推理顯著提高了大型語言模型（LLMs）的推理能力，但由於冗長的自回歸痕跡，會產生高昂的推理成本。現有的潛在推理方法提供了一個有前景的替代方案，但它們通常將推理視為均勻可壓縮的，導致對精確性至關重要的中間步驟被過度壓縮，從而降低了推理的準確性。在這項工作中，我們提出了選擇性潛在思維（SLT），這是一個框架，能夠選擇性地將冗餘的推理區間壓縮成潛在表示，同時在同一推理軌跡中保留精確性至關重要的區間作為明確的CoT。具體而言，SLT首先使用輕量級解碼器來預測即將到來的短推理區間，然後應用基於信心的閘控來確定可以可靠壓縮的最長區間。接受的區間被編碼成緊湊的潛在表示，以提高推理效率，而不確定或精確性關鍵的推理則保持在明確的CoT形式中以保留準確性。為了學習這種選擇性壓縮策略，SLT採用了一種三階段的訓練策略，結合了區間級潛在壓縮、可靠性意識的未來推理預測和軌跡級強化學習，以優化答案正確性和推理成本之間的權衡。在四個數學推理基準上的廣泛實驗表明，SLT在可比較的壓縮比下，達到了比潛在推理基線高22.7\%的準確率，同時推理鏈長度減少了58.4\%，與明確的CoT相比僅有2.8\%的準確性下降。我們的代碼可以在 https://github.com/hunshi34/SLT 找到。
2605.25745.author: Hui Xie et.al.
2605.25745.authors: Hui Xie, Jie Liu, Ziyue Qiao, Joaquin Vanschore
